title: サトノダイヤモンド登場！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond, heiress of the Satono Group, is
set to make her debut in the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her dream is to fulfill the Satono family's
long-held dream of producing an illustrious
runner capable of winning G1 races.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She has garnered a great deal of attention from
both her family and her fans. Still, she claims that
fulfilling this wish is her dream and she doesn't
feel pressured.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She has one other dream—racing in the Twinkle
Series with Kitasan Black, a childhood friend who
made her debut just recently.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the dreams and expectations of so many
people on her shoulders, Satono Diamond's
journey begins!
